title: brachypodium pinnatum var. longifolium
intro: Brachypodium pinnatum var. longifolium, also known as tall false brome or false brome grass, is a type of plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Brachypodium pinnatum var. longifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
